And then branching off of there, once we established a set of pages, we were envisioning for the first launch a very simple breadcrumb where you just have a hub and then individual pages that are a company.

So OpenAI is a great example.

We would separate those out into two different pages.

Like a consumer hot takes and highlights, lowlights.
Then we also envision a metronome's take section.
